_note: AI pilot posts 2-5 (post 1 = phone glow is in post.ai-example.json). NOT loaded by the renderer/validator — this is a copy-paste staging file. After a clip passes review and is moved to assets/ai-generated/approved/, copy its post object (without _note) into the `posts` array of posts.json, then run the renderer. See ../AI-VIDEO-PILOT.md. Nothing here is posted or scheduled.

posts.caption: same birthday song, four totally different vibes 🎤🔥🎻🤠 comment which one you'd actually send 👇
posts.cta: Pick your vibe → link in bio
posts.ai_prompt: Vertical 9:16 abstract music-themed background of flowing light ribbons and soft particles slowly shifting through warm color moods, dreamy, premium, no people, no text, seamless gentle motion.
posts.ai_negative_prompt: people, children, faces, text, logos, watermark, harsh strobing, low quality

posts.hook: The calmest last-minute gift there is
posts.on_screen_text: made their whole birthday in 2 min
posts.caption: no panic, no shipping, no stress ☕ just a song with their name, done before bed 💗
posts.cta: Try it tonight → link in bio
posts.ai_prompt: Vertical 9:16 cinematic cozy late-night scene, an adult wrapped in a blanket on a couch with a warm lamp and a mug, calm relieved soft smile while looking down at a phone, warm film grain, intimate, three-quarter angle, shallow depth of field.
posts.ai_negative_prompt: children, teens, minors, brand logos, readable text, distorted hands, extra fingers, uncanny face, celebrity likeness, watermark, low quality

posts.caption: we got you 🫶 a personalized song, done before midnight. tag the friend who always forgets 👇
posts.ai_prompt: Vertical 9:16 cinematic scene, an adult sitting up in a dim bedroom lit only by a glowing phone at night, a worried expression turning to relief, warm lamp bokeh, handheld feel, realistic, moody warm tones, three-quarter angle.
posts.ai_negative_prompt: children, teens, minors, brand logos, readable text, distorted hands, extra fingers, uncanny face, celebrity likeness, watermark, low quality

posts.hook: Gift card vs a song with their name
posts.on_screen_text: one they forget · one they replay
posts.caption: anyone can send a gift card 🥱 send a song that's literally about them instead 🤯
posts.cta: Upgrade the gift → link in bio
posts.ai_prompt: Vertical 9:16 cinematic two-part scene: first a plain blank generic gift card tossed onto a table under dull cool light, then a warm glowing phone playing music while an adult hand rests nearby, warm inviting light, clear visual contrast, realistic, no readable text or logos.
posts.ai_negative_prompt: real or branded gift cards, brand logos, readable text, children, distorted hands, watermark, celebrity likeness, low quality
